name: Principal dimensions
example_fields: width; depth; length; height; nominal vs actual

name: Material specification
example_fields: spec; grade; Fy; raw-material coating class

name: Support arrangement
example_fields: support_count; support_role ref; spacing[]; orientation (LEGS_DOWN|LEGS_UP); inversion

name: Joining / attachment
example_fields: method (RESISTANCE_WELD|FUSION_WELD|CLINCH|BOLT|RIVET|INTERLOCK); weld schedule class; fastener spec

name: Hole / punch pattern
example_fields: pattern id; pitch; gauge; hole geometry; start offset

name: End condition
example_fields: end fittings; cope/notch; cap; swage; end-flare
